name: Chocolate-Covered Cherry Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 package Fudge brownie mix with chocolate flavor syrup (21.3-oz); see note
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
Blend brownie mix, chocolate-flavor syrup, eggs, and shortening. The dough will be stiff. Mix until well blended. Stir in pecans and cherries.
Drop by teaspoonfuls onto ungreased cookie sheets.
Bake for 8 minutes. Remove cookies from the oven while still soft and underbaked. Let cool for 2 to 3 minutes before removing from the cookie sheets. (Standing time allows cookies to finish cooking.)
Yield: 4 1/2 to 5 dozen cookies.
Note: The recipe was tested with Betty Crocker Supreme Dark Chocolate Premium Brownie Mix. When mixing the ingredients, it may seem there is too little moisture in the recipe. However, keep stirring and the ingredients will blend well.
